## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🚀 Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔄 Dependency update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI change

## Testing

### Manual Testing
<!-- How did you test your changes? -->

- [ ] Tested locally with Docker Compose
- [ ] Tested against staging environment
- [ ] Verified all services communicate correctly

### Automated Tests
<!-- What tests did you run? -->

```bash
pytest backend/ -v
npm run test
```

- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Coverage maintained (>80%)

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] No new warnings generated

### Documentation
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Docstrings added/updated
- [ ] Migration guide added (if breaking change)

### Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added
- [ ] Integration tests updated
- [ ] No flaky tests
- [ ] Performance impact assessed

### Security
- [ ] No sensitive data/secrets exposed
- [ ] Input validation added
- [ ] SQL injection risks checked
- [ ] CORS/Auth properly handled

### DevOps
- [ ] Docker image builds successfully
- [ ] Environment variables documented
- [ ] Database migrations (if applicable) tested
- [ ] No dependency conflicts
